title: ENDELEMENT
text: ENDELEMENT Operation activated by the SAX parser when it encounters an end tag. Use the following syntax if namespace has already been enabled, or if namespace support is not required: Explain this code operation ENDELEMENT params string Name: in endparams Implement your code here end; ENDELEMENT operation Copy Use the following syntax to enable namespace support: Explain this code operation ENDELEMENT params string Name: in string QName: in string URI: in endparams Implement your code here end; ENDELEMENT operation Copy Arguments Compatiblity mode parameters Name —name of the tag. Namespace parameters Name —unqualified tag name, which is the tag name without the prefix. QName —fully-qualified tag name (that is, the tag name including the prefix). URI —namespace with which prefix was previously associated, either in the same tag or in an earlier tag for which the end tag has not yet been parsed. Description This operation is called by PARSE and PARSEFILE for each end tag encountered. The values of the parameters are the same values that were provided with the corresponding STARTELEMENT invocation for the corresponding start tag. Related Links PARSE Parses a specified XML stream. PARSEFILE Parses an XML document in the specified file. STARTELEMENT Operation activated by the SAX parser when a start tag is encountered. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
